title: BAT leak in some aggregate queries
poc: select count(*) from (select * from a union all select * from b) z;
select count(*) from sys.bbp() where kind='transient';
key_bug_features: counting from union all in aggregate queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (id INT, value VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE b (id INT, value VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO b (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test3');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM a UNION ALL SELECT * FROM b) z;
